meanings.definition: pull out from an agreement, contract, statement, etc.
examples: The landlord cannot resile from the lease

meanings.definition: spring back; spring away from an impact
examples: These particles do not resile but they unite after they collide

meanings.definition: formally reject or disavow a formerly held belief, usually under pressure
examples: He retracted his earlier statements about his religion

meanings.definition: return to the original position or state after being stretched or compressed
